data.body: AC amendment (Gap: missing_error_path): Add test case test_user_declines_confirmation: Given valid tag precondition, no lock conflict, pull+merge succeed; When user provides 'n' input to confirmation prompt (simulate via stdin mock, interactive mode — no --non-interactive flag); Then: exit 0 (or distinct code), no ticket tag swap performed, no metadata comment added, lockfile removed. Add as test 9 in test_figma_resync.py.
